metadata.name: - S.O.C.S.v12 -- Got A 4Ways to Go
metadata.author: fishbrain+SFR
metadata.source: fishbrain+SFR -- S.O.C.S.v12 -- Got A 4Ways to Go.milk

perFrameCode: //q32 -- volume        Rough signal indicating loudness (0 to 2-ish)
//q30 -- vol_texture   How rough or smooth is volume (0=leg, 1=stec)
//q29 -- bass_beat     boolian (1 or 0) 1 = sudden spike in bass
//q28 -- bass_weight   % of total volume that is bass (0 to 1)
//q27 -- bass_text     How rough or smooth is bass   (0=leg, 1=stec)
//q26 -- mid_beat      boolian (1 or 0) 1 = sudden spike in mid
//q25 -- mid_weight    % of total volume that is mid  (0 to 1)
//q24 -- mid_text      How rough or smooth is mid    (0=leg, 1=stec)
//q23 -- treb_beat     boolian (1 or 0) 1 = sudden spike in treb
//q22 -- treb_weight   % of total volume that is treb (0 to 1)
//q21 -- treb_tex      How rough or smooth is treb   (0=leg, 1=stec)
//   set these variables to taste, or control them with your code!
// These increase the senstivity of the beat detectors (0 to 1)
// Use these to set the sensitivity of the texture signals (0 .. 100)
// Set weights_smooth to 0 if you want to use the rougher signal
q28 = if((weights_smooth), bass_att * q31, bass * q32);
q25 = if((weights_smooth), mid_att * q31, mid * q32);
q22 = if((weights_smooth), treb_att * q31, treb * q32);
//q1 -- first sample  -- 0 to 1 as sample mode above to set mirror type for 1st sample
//q2 -- second sample -- 0 to 1 as sample mode above to set mirror type for 2nd sample
//q4 --  first blend  -- 0 to 1 as blending mode above to mix 1st & 2nd samples
//q5 --    balance    -- 0.0 = first sample  to  1.0 = second sample
//q3 -- third sample  -- 0 to 1 as sample mode above
//q6 -- second blend  -- 0 to 1 as blending mode above to mix 1st blend from q4 & 3rd sample
//  Set these according to the notes above to chose up to three mirroring methods
// and how to blend them together to get the output you want
//         You should still have 20 user variables left and q8 to q20
//          VVVVVVVVVVV  Add your beautiful code below  VVVVVVVVVVV
ave_vol = (bass_att + mid_att + treb_att)*.25;       //average of all volumes (bass, mid and treb)
beat = if (above (ave_vol-.5, old_vol),1,0);  //looks for jump in volume from frame to frame
// tone detection  ---> base loudest(7)  mid loudest(6)  treb loudest(4)
tone = if (above (bass, mid), if (above (bass, treb),0, 4), if (above (mid, treb),7, 4));
// flipflop  --->reverses direction of rotator at both ends of rotators range
// rotator  ---> increments from 0 to 1, then back down to 0, steps on each beat
